heading: Appropriations for United States Fish and Wildlife Service; purchases from
label: 754a Appropriations for United States Fish and Wildlife Service; purchases from
text: The Secretary of the Interior may purchase, to the extent of not to exceed $5,000, from the appropriations for the United States Fish and Wildlife Service, clothing and small stores for the crews of vessels, to be sold to the employees of said service and the appropriations reimbursed.
